arts.ttl: West Ham XI vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: West Ham head to the Midlands to face Leicester City in the Premier League on Tuesday night. Both teams will be aiming to improve upon recent performances, with each beaten heavily at the weekend. West Ham suffered a 5-2 defeat at home to Arsenal, as the Irons conceded five first-half goals at the London Stadium. […] The post West Ham XI vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: West Ham loanee could be sent back in January, talks held over new move – report
arts.sum: West Ham attacker Maxwel Cornet could have his loan spell at Southampton cut short in January, according to Jack Rosser. The Sun journalist reported on... The post West Ham loanee could be sent back in January, talks held over new move – report appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: 'Rocking' King Power Stadium 'won't help' Leicester City vs West Ham
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is hoping to breathe belief back into the Leicester City fanbase, starting with tonight’s home match against West Ham United. “Both teams were beaten heavily at the weekend and this feels like a massive game for West Ham boss Julen Lopetegui, who is back under scrutiny again after such a big defeat at home to Arsenal,” he said.

arts.ttl: Triple title winner in line for sensational West Ham switch
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui remains on borrowed time at West Ham United, and if the Hammers were to lose against Leicester, the club may get in contact with a triple title winner to replace him. It’s long been thought that the Spaniard is on his last legs at the club, though he’s managed to remain in his […] The post Triple title winner in line for sensational West Ham switch appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Sergio Conceicao to West Ham update emerges amid support from within club hierarchy - report
arts.sum: West Ham are yet to make an approach to Sergio Conceicao to be their next manager, according to the Guardian. The news outlet reported on... The post Sergio Conceicao to West Ham update emerges amid support from within club hierarchy - report appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy's phone calls delve into Leicester City squad in bid to lift 'grumpy' crowd
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy hopes to build an immediate connection with his new players, which he believes will generate the good performances that are required to get fans back on side. For van Nistelrooy, who has been making phone calls to get the lowdown on the personalities of his new players, respect for his position is vital.

arts.ttl: West Ham eye manager with 15 trophies to replace Lopetegui, was seen in London recently - report
arts.sum: West Ham are eyeing Massimiliano Allegri as a potential replacement for Julen Lopetegui, according to the Guardian. The news outlet reported that along with the... The post West Ham eye manager with 15 trophies to replace Lopetegui, was seen in London recently - report appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy issues January transfer warning to Leicester City squad and drops backroom hint
arts.sum: The Leicester City squad have four weeks to prove to new manager Ruud van Nistelrooy that their position does not need strengthening in the January transfer window. Asked about the possibility of January transfers, Van Nistelrooy said at his opening press conference: “That was a topic of discussion (with the chairman).

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Premier League predictions including Leicester vs. West Ham
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Leicester City vs. West Ham United.

arts.ttl: “Should not” | West Ham make contact over horror forward
arts.sum: West Ham have reportedly made contact regarding a striker with just two goals in the last two seasons. While the signings of Gianluca Scamacca, Sebastian Haller, and Niclas Fullkrug may not have worked out, they did all make sense on paper for one reason – they all scored goals. The latter may still do so... The post “Should not” | West Ham make contact over horror forward appeared first on The West Ham Way.
